_comment: Project-shared hooks for wiki-template. (1) PostToolUse(Task) -> emit_trace.py captures wiki-* subagent pipeline traces (see agents/pipeline/observability.md). (2) UserPromptSubmit -> detect_repetition.py watches for recurring user intents and suggests promoting them to a skill/command/agent/pack (see agents/pipeline/repetition-detection.md). Both hooks are best-effort and NEVER block the turn.
